DuPage County Forest Preserve Trail & Tree Canopy Analyzer

Author: Brian Bergstrom

Dashboard Summary:
This interactive GIS tool identifies microclimate conditions across local trail networks by intersecting vector path features with high-resolution regional elevation structures and tree canopy matrices. Use this map layer to discover optimized paths based on shade density and physical slope difficulty.
Canopy Index Legend:
Heavily Shaded (75% - 100%)
Moderate Canopy (50% - 75%)
Light Savannah (25% - 50%)
Exposed Prairie (0% - 25%)
DuPage County Envelope Framework
Dataset Sources:
• Regional Trails & Boundaries: DuPage County GIS Data Portal
• Elevation Contours: DuPage County 2022 Topography (Equator Studios)
• Tree Canopy Raster Matrix: UVM Spatial Analysis Lab Land Cover Assessment
